steps.action: Navigate to /cash and inspect swap widget default tokens
steps.expected: CASH is shown as default swap token (not ETH)
steps.observed: Swap widget showed CASH in default pair state (U USD1 -> C CASH); ETH was not shown in selector state

steps.action: Open token selector from swap widget
steps.expected: Selector includes CASH, USD1, USDC, USDT, USDe
steps.observed: Selector showed CASH, USD1, USDC, USDT, and USDe

evidence.consoleErrors: agent-browser errors reported 3x 'Failed to fetch' (background noise not blocking assertion)

assertions.title: Swap execution wired

steps.action: With disconnected wallet and empty input, inspect swap CTA and quote section
steps.observed: CTA displayed 'Connect Wallet'; no quote details (Exchange rate/Route/Minimum received hidden); 'You receive 0 CASH' shown

steps.expected: Quote appears and CTA state is appropriate
steps.observed: Quote rendered (You receive 1,033.955794 CASH; Exchange rate/Route/Price impact/Minimum received visible) while CTA remained 'Connect Wallet'

steps.action: Attempt wallet-connect path for connected submit validation
steps.expected: If wallet connection is feasible, continue to Swap submit path
steps.observed: Connect modal opened with Google/Apple options and Petra/Nightly/Backpack install links, but no connected wallet context was available in this headless isolated run

evidence.consoleErrors: agent-browser errors reported 3x 'Failed to fetch'; console also showed recurring external RPC 403 noise from non-CASH providers
evidence.network: In-page fetch checks: GET /cash-api/depth -> 200, GET /cash-api/market -> 200; quote rendering observed in UI after amount entry

assertions.issues: Connected swap-submit path could not be validated in this environment due unavailable wallet connection context (no injected wallet session/credentials). Pre-submit disconnected/no-amount/with-amount behavior was validated.

frictions.description: agent-browser network request capture returned empty for this run
frictions.resolution: Used in-page fetch() checks to capture local API statuses for required network evidence

blockers.description: Connected wallet + swap-submit path not feasible in isolated headless session
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened Connect Wallet modal and verified available options; only install/social-login paths were present, but no connected wallet context was available for transaction submission

summary: Tested 2 assertions: INT-004 passed; INT-005 pre-submit behavior validated but overall marked blocked on connected swap-submit path due wallet-connect unavailability in this environment.
